title: Enriched Model Metadata & Capability Flags
content: Define a 'ModelCapability' interface that includes flags: 'isReasoning', 'supportsTemperature', 'requiresMaxCompletionTokens', 'supportsExtendedThinking'. The ModelService should lookup these capabilities from a local static map when a model is selected. AIService then uses these flags to construct the request body, making it resilient to new model name variations.

rationale.anomaly: String-based detection in AIService is becoming complex and fragile.
rationale.approach: Centralize model capability knowledge into a metadata layer.
